sections.title: Key Grammar Points
points: Question tags check information: positive + negative, negative + positive.

sections.title: Useful Writing Tips
points: Use punctuation marks to make meanings clear.
Use -ing adjectives for causes and -ed adjectives for feelings.
Use passive voice when the action is the focus.

sections.text: Tip: If you are unsure, ask 'What is the main idea?' and choose the grammar form that matches it.

cards.fact: Add a short question at the end of a sentence to confirm it.
Use it to tell someone what another person said.
